description: Insurance endorsement lifecycle platform built with Hexagonal Architecture, Cloud-Native Patterns, and GenAI augmentation via Ollama.

infrastructureNodes.description: Routes external traffic to backend service
infrastructureNodes.name: Ingress Controller

infrastructureNodes.description: minAvailable: 1 — ensures availability during rolling updates
infrastructureNodes.name: PodDisruptionBudget

people.description: Creates and manages employee endorsements (ADD/DELETE/UPDATE) for group health insurance policies.
people.name: HR Administrator

relationships.description: Creates endorsements, tracks status, views EA balance
Creates endorsements, tracks status, views EA balance

people.description: Monitors EA (Endorsement Account) balances, reviews forecasts, and manages fund top-ups.
people.name: Finance Team

people.description: Monitors system health, reviews anomalies, resolves errors, and manages insurer relationships.
people.name: Operations Team

relationships.description: Reviews anomalies, manages insurers, monitors health
Reviews anomalies, manages insurers, monitors health

softwareSystems.description: Local large language model for GenAI anomaly enrichment and error resolution.
softwareSystems.name: Ollama LLM

containers.description: 10-screen SPA: dashboard, endorsement CRUD, EA lookup, intelligence hub, insurer config, reconciliation, audit log.
containers.name: React Dashboard

components.description: 9 endpoints: create, get, list, submit, confirm, reject, coverage, batches, outstanding.
components.name: EndorsementController

components.description: EA account balance lookup by employer+insurer.
components.name: EAAccountController

components.description: 17 endpoints: anomalies, forecasts, error resolutions, process mining, health scores, benchmarks.
components.name: IntelligenceController

components.description: 5 endpoints: list, get, capabilities, create, update insurer configurations.
components.name: InsurerConfigController

components.description: 3 endpoints: list runs, get items, trigger reconciliation.
components.name: ReconciliationController

components.description: Query immutable audit trail entries with filters.
components.name: AuditLogController

components.description: RFC 7807 ProblemDetail error responses. Maps 9 exception types to HTTP status codes.
components.name: GlobalExceptionHandler

components.description: Command handler: validate, idempotency check, debit EA, grant provisional coverage, publish Created event. @Transactional.
components.name: CreateEndorsementHandler

components.description: Command handler: route to insurer (RT/batch), confirm, reject, retry, state transitions, publish lifecycle events.
components.name: ProcessEndorsementHandler

components.description: Query handler: find by ID, list by employer, paginate, filter. @Transactional(readOnly=true).
components.name: EndorsementQueryHandler

components.description: Orchestrates anomaly detection across employers. Delegates to AnomalyDetectionPort.
components.name: AnomalyDetectionService

components.description: Projects EA balance 30 days ahead with dual seasonality.
components.name: BalanceForecastService

components.description: Suggests/auto-applies fixes for rejected endorsements. 95% confidence threshold.
components.name: ErrorResolutionService

components.description: Computes STP rates, bottleneck analysis, transition metrics.
components.name: ProcessMiningService

components.description: Composite health score from endorsement patterns, EA utilization, error rates.
components.name: EmployerHealthScoreService

components.description: Compares insurer performance: latency, success rates, SLA compliance.
components.name: InsurerBenchmarkService

components.description: Records and queries immutable audit trail entries.
components.name: AuditLogService

components.description: Matches system records against insurer records, flags discrepancies.
components.name: ReconciliationEngine

components.description: Assembles queued endorsements into batches per insurer. Runs every 15 min. @SchedulerLock.
components.name: BatchAssemblyScheduler

components.description: Scans for anomalous endorsement patterns. Runs every 5 min.
components.name: AnomalyDetectionScheduler

components.description: Generates balance forecasts for all employers. Daily at 06:00.
components.name: BalanceForecastScheduler

components.description: Nightly reconciliation against insurer records.
components.name: ReconciliationScheduler

components.description: Computes STP rates and process metrics. Daily at 03:00.
components.name: ProcessMiningScheduler

components.description: Expires provisional coverages past 30-day window.
components.name: ProvisionalCoverageCleanup

components.description: Retries endorsements stuck in intermediate states.
components.name: StuckEndorsementRetryScheduler

components.description: Archives old data per retention policy. Weekly.
components.name: DataRetentionScheduler

components.description: Aggregate root: 11-state lifecycle, optimistic locking, idempotency key, retry count. Rich domain model with transitionTo() validation.
components.name: Endorsement

components.description: Aggregate root: composite key (employerId, insurerId), balance/reserved/available, debit/credit/reserve operations.
components.name: EAAccount

components.description: Sealed interface with 24 event record types: lifecycle (11), financial (2), reconciliation (3), intelligence (6), coverage (2).
components.name: EndorsementEvent

components.description: 11-state enum with EnumSet-based O(1) transition validation. canTransitionTo(), isTerminal().
components.name: EndorsementStatus

components.description: Enforces valid state transitions. Single entry point for all state changes.
components.name: EndorsementStateMachine

components.description: Batch priority sequencing: DELETEs first (P0), cost-neutral UPDATEs (P1), ADDs by urgency (P2). 0/1 Knapsack DP.
components.name: EABalanceCalculator

components.description: @Cacheable insurer config lookup with @CacheEvict on updates. Caffeine 60s TTL.
components.name: InsurerRegistry

components.description: Port: CRUD + findByIdempotencyKey, findByStatus, findByEmployerId.
components.name: EndorsementRepository

components.description: Port: findByEmployerIdAndInsurerId, save with optimistic lock.
components.name: EAAccountRepository

components.description: Port: batch assembly and status tracking.
components.name: BatchRepository

components.description: Port: submitRealTime, submitBatch, checkBatchStatus, getCapabilities. Strategy pattern interface.
components.name: InsurerPort

components.description: Port: publish(EndorsementEvent). Observer pattern.
components.name: EventPublisher

components.description: Port: detectAnomalies(employerId). Pluggable algorithm.
components.name: AnomalyDetectionPort

components.description: Port: generateForecast(employerId, insurerId). Pluggable engine.
components.name: BalanceForecastPort

components.description: Port: resolveError(endorsementId, errorMessage). Pluggable resolver.
components.name: ErrorResolutionPort

components.description: Port: computeStpRate(insurerId). Pluggable analyzer.
components.name: ProcessMiningPort

components.description: Port: optimizeBatch(endorsements, availableBalance). Pluggable optimizer.
components.name: BatchOptimizerPort

components.description: Port: sendNotification(type, payload). Pluggable channel.
components.name: NotificationPort

components.description: Implements EndorsementRepository. Uses EndorsementMapper ACL for domain<->entity translation.
components.name: JpaEndorsementRepositoryAdapter

components.description: Implements EAAccountRepository. Composite key mapping.
components.name: JpaEAAccountRepositoryAdapter

components.description: Anti-Corruption Layer: translates domain enums to JPA strings, JsonNode to column types. Only class that imports both domain and JPA types.
components.name: EndorsementMapper

components.description: Factory pattern: auto-discovers InsurerPort beans via Spring DI, resolves correct adapter at runtime from DB config.
components.name: InsurerRouter

components.description: JSON/REST, 100ms delay, synthetic refs. @CircuitBreaker + @Retry.
components.name: MockInsurerAdapter

components.description: REST/JSON, RT only, 150ms. @CircuitBreaker(name='iciciLombard') with 50%/20-call/30s config.
components.name: IciciLombardAdapter

components.description: CSV/SFTP, batch only. submitRealTime() throws UnsupportedOperationException.
components.name: NivaBupaAdapter

components.description: SOAP/XML, RT+batch, 250ms. @CircuitBreaker(name='bajajAllianz') with 40%/15-call/45s config.
components.name: BajajAllianzAdapter

components.description: 5 rules: Volume Spike, ADD/DELETE Cycling, Suspicious Timing, Unusual Premium, Dormancy Break. Score 0-1.
components.name: RuleBasedAnomalyDetector

components.description: @ConditionalOnProperty(ollama). Wraps rule-based, enriches scores > 0.7 with LLM explanations. @CircuitBreaker with rule-based fallback.
components.name: OllamaAugmentedAnomalyDetector

components.description: 30-day projection with dual seasonality: day-of-week (Mon=1.2x) + monthly (Apr=1.4x).
components.name: StatisticalForecastEngine

components.description: 5 error patterns with confidence scoring. Auto-apply above 95%.
components.name: SimulatedErrorResolver

components.description: @ConditionalOnProperty(ollama). Handles ambiguous cases (<95% confidence) with LLM analysis. @CircuitBreaker with rule-based fallback.
components.name: OllamaErrorResolver

components.description: STP rate computation, bottleneck identification from event stream.
components.name: EventStreamAnalyzer

components.description: Priority sequencing + balance-aware batch assembly. 0/1 Knapsack DP.
components.name: ConstraintBatchOptimizer

components.description: Implements EventPublisher. Serializes events to JSON, sends to endorsement-events topic with employerId partition key. acks=all.
components.name: KafkaEventPublisher

components.description: Stateless sessions (SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS), CORS, CSRF disabled.
components.name: SecurityConfig

components.description: Injects requestId, traceId, spanId, endorsementId, employerId into MDC. Cleans in finally block.
components.name: MdcRequestFilter

components.description: 20+ custom Micrometer metrics: counters (created, confirmed, rejected, error), timers (insurer latency), gauges (11 status counts).
components.name: MetricsConfig

components.description: Distributed scheduler locking via JDBC. Prevents duplicate runs across instances.
components.name: ShedLockConfig

containers.description: Core backend: 6 controllers (27 endpoints), 3 CQRS handlers, 8 services, 9 schedulers. Hexagonal architecture with zero infrastructure imports in domain core.
containers.name: Endorsement Service

containers.description: 13 tables, 20 Flyway migrations. ACID for financial operations. Optimistic locking. JSONB for flexible employee data.
containers.name: PostgreSQL

containers.description: Distributed cache (60s TTL). @Cacheable for InsurerRegistry. Session-free (stateless).
containers.name: Redis

containers.description: 4 topics, 88 partitions. employerId partition key for per-employer ordering. KRaft mode (no ZooKeeper).
containers.name: Kafka

containers.description: 7 auto-provisioned dashboards: app overview, business metrics, infrastructure, multi-insurer, reconciliation, intelligence, scheduler.
containers.name: Grafana

containers.description: Distributed tracing via OTLP. 100% sampling. Search by endorsementId for full request journey.
containers.name: Jaeger

containers.description: Structured JSON log storage. Full-text search across all log fields.
containers.name: Elasticsearch

containers.description: Log pipeline: TCP input from app, parsing, forwarding to Elasticsearch.
containers.name: Logstash

containers.description: Log visualization: search, filter, dashboard over Elasticsearch indices.
containers.name: Kibana

softwareSystems.description: Manages the complete endorsement lifecycle: creation, validation, provisional coverage, multi-insurer submission, reconciliation, and intelligence analytics. 27 REST endpoints, 11-state lifecycle, 5 AI pillars.
softwareSystems.name: Plum Endorsement System

name: Plum Endorsement Management System
